Stub function for getting a heart rate zone based on beats per minute.

# Purpose
This C header file defines a function [`hr_util_get_hr_zone`](<#hr_util_get_hr_zone>) that takes an integer parameter `bpm`, representing beats per minute, and returns a value of type `HRZone`. The function currently returns a constant value `HRZone_Zone1`, indicating a specific heart rate zone. The file includes the header `services/normal/activity/hr_util.h`, which likely contains the definition of the `HRZone` type and possibly other related declarations. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
